steps.title: Don PPE and verify seal
steps.action: Confirm suit integrity, glove seal, and respirator connection before entering the containment space.

steps.title: Prepare workspace
steps.action: Disinfect the work surface, confirm reagent placement, and stage labeled containers in the biosafety cabinet.

steps.title: Process sample transfer
steps.action: Move the sample into the prepared vessel using the approved aseptic transfer technique and confirm container closure.

steps.title: Record observations
steps.action: Inspect culture appearance, note any contamination indicators, and capture voice observations before cleanup.

steps.title: Decontaminate and exit
steps.action: Secure materials, perform final surface decontamination, and complete the doffing checklist before leaving the lab.
